nasb.text: Therefore those who use proverbs say, “Come to Heshbon! Let it be built! So let the city of Sihon be established.

esv.text: Therefore the ballad singers say, “Come to Heshbon, let it be built; let the city of Sihon be established.

cnv.text: 因此詩人說： “你們來到希實本！ 願西宏的城被重建， 願西宏的城堅立。

ccb.text: 因此有人作诗说： “来希实本吧！ 重建西宏的城。
